emails.subject: E-Request 70996
emails.body: E-Request 70996 Could you please check on Request number #70996 for Maria Van Houten? Are we waiting for an approval from someone? I really appreciate this Stacey, talk to you later Chip

emails.subject: RE: E-Request 70996
emails.body: RE: E-Request 70996 I was working on getting the right sign-off before I approved or denied. I should know no later than tomorrow. Stacey To: White, Stacey W.

emails.subject: RE: E-Request 70996
emails.body: thanks for the update stacey. To: Cox, Chip
